name: open-second-brain
description: Plugin-first second brain package for Codex, Hermes, Claude Code, OpenClaw, and other agent runtimes.

interface.shortDescription: Per-vault second brain for AI agents using Obsidian-compatible Markdown
interface.longDescription: Open Second Brain gives every agent on this machine a shared, append-only event log and a curated AI Wiki space inside a portable Markdown vault. The plugin exposes vault status, query, capture, event-log append, and vault health tools via MCP, and injects a per-turn identity reminder so agents reliably log durable artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Capture this finding to the second brain
